# Martenweave

> Martenweave is an open-source backend-first model registry that turns Excel, tickets, datasets, validation reports, decisions, and SAP context into canonical model files, deterministic validation, generated indexes, gap detection, lineage, impact analysis, and human-approved AI patch proposals.

Current core: `martenweave-core` version `0.4.1`, Python 3.11+, MIT licensed.

Canonical Markdown and YAML model files are the source of truth. SQLite and JSONL indexes are derived, rebuildable artifacts.

AI proposes. Validators verify. Humans approve. AI and import workflows create reviewable `PatchProposal` objects; they do not silently mutate canonical model files.

Martenweave has no direct SAP write-back. It is not a chatbot, generic SaaS dashboard, enterprise MDM replacement, workflow engine, generic data catalog, SAP product, or SAP-affiliated product.

Maintainer: Dzmitryi Kharlanau.

## Official links

- Website: https://martenweave.github.io/
- Documentation: https://martenweave.github.io/docs.html
- Core source: https://github.com/metalhatscats/martenweave-core
- Website source: https://github.com/Martenweave/martenweave.github.io
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/martenweave-core/
- Full AI context: https://martenweave.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Machine-readable identity: https://martenweave.github.io/ai.json
